# Documentation Templates

This directory contains reusable documentation templates used throughout the project.

The templates are designed to promote:

- Consistency
- Readability
- Maintainability
- Standardized documentation

## Available Templates

| Template | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| ADR | Architecture Decision Records |
| Deployment | Deployment Guides |
| Incident | Incident Reports |
| Release | Release Documentation |
| Runbook | Operational Procedures |

These templates serve as the foundation for all project documentation.
